render-mode.text:
<script>
                    (function () {
                        var containerId = "${_dynamic_container_id}";
                        if (!containerId) return;
                        var $container = $("#" + containerId);
                        if (!$container.length) return;
                        $container.find(".form-list-nav a").on("click", function (evt) {
                            evt.preventDefault();
                            var href = $(this).attr("href");
                            if (href) $container.load(href);
                        });
                        $container.find(".form-list-nav form").on("submit", function (evt) {
                            evt.preventDefault();
                            var $form = $(this);
                            $container.load($form.attr("action"), $form.serialize());
                        });
                    })();
                </script>
